title: Automation content

posts.author: SergioMolla (Sergio Molla)
posts.cookedHtml: I created an automation and I want to send a notification. When I want to show certain columns on the item, it shows the text like {item’s Column1} instead of the value of the column for the item. The board has been imported from excel. Can anybody help?

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sergio,

Usually this only happens when a column name changes or a column gets deleted, can you try and setup this notification again from scratch using a new automation or deleting and adding the action step again?

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: Miccyox (Miccyox)
posts.cookedHtml: I had a similar issue syncing content updates with campaigns across teams. What ended up working well for me was setting a status change trigger to post updates directly in a shared board. We use tools like Madgicx to handle ads, so connecting those updates back into monday.com keeps everyone in sync without extra messages flying around.
